---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem**
What are you trying to do that ERO doesn't support today?

**Proposal**
What you'd like to happen.

**Scope check**
Does this belong in ERO (orchestration / the OpenAI-compatible surface), or
upstream in [mmv](https://github.com/mobius-style/mmv) (answer entitlement) /
[rqa](https://github.com/mobius-style/rqa) (question generation)?

**Alternatives**
Anything you considered or are working around today.
